channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260617)
item.description:
What's New

feat(autocap): add option to capitalize only after a space following sentence punctuation

Add a sub-option (capitalizeOnlyAfterSpace, default on) under the existing

auto-capitalize-first-letter feature. When enabled, a sentence-ending mark

(. ? !) only triggers capitalization if it is followed by a space, so tokens

like "google.com", "3.14", and "file.txt" are no longer mangled. A newline

always capitalizes regardless of this option. When disabled, the legacy

behavior is preserved (capitalize right after . ? ! even with no space).

Engine: extend upperCaseStatus with value 3 (sentence-ender + space seen) and

gate the apply step on vUpperCaseRequireSpace. All status transitions stay

centralized in updateUpperCaseStatus, so both the CGEvent-tap and IMKit input

paths inherit the behavior. The flag is threaded through Preferences,

SharedSettings (default true), KeyboardEventHandler, AppDelegate,

XKeyIMController, and VNEngineSettings, with a settings UI toggle and a debug

line.

Tests: update the two cases that assumed legacy no-space capitalization and add

coverage for both modes, domain-like input, and newline-always-caps.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
